case_title: ALEXANDRE GOMES DE MATTOS VS. NATHAN DAVID BERNHARD BECKMAN

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-25-2017 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-25-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-25-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF ALEXANDRE GOMES DE MATTOS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT NATHAN BAVID BERNHARD BECKMAN IS PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE OF THE CLAIM. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DE MATTOS, ALEXANDRE GOMES  - DRIVER IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT BECKMAN, NATHAN DAVID BERNHARD  - DRIVER/REGISTERED OWNER PLAINTIFF'S CHIROPRACTIC TREATMENT IS NOT EXPLAINED BY THIS VERY LOW IMPACT AUTO ACCIDENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY DE MATTOS, ALEXANDRE GOMES  - DRIVER AS TO DEFENDANT BECKMAN, NATHAN DAVID BERNHARD  - DRIVER/REGISTERED OWNER ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-25-2017 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
